---
title: "analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-16"
---

```{r}
WKDir ="/Users/z5161362/OneDrive - DPIE/Documents/PhD/spatRast/"

source(paste0(WKDir,"R/cost_distance.r"))
```

```{r}
# Workflow
# calc_cost_to_tracks this one does eveything?

cost <- load_cost_raster(paste0(WKDir,"data/processing/wol/cost.tif"))
track <- load_tracks(paste0(WKDir,"data/processing/wol/tracks.rds"))
burn <- burn_tracks(cost, track)

# Raster CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Tracks CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Raster dimensions: 63475 rows x 44573 cols (2,829,271,175 cells)
# Resolution: 2 x 2 m
# Rasterizing tracks onto cost surface...
# Error in matrix(v, ncol = nlyr(x)) : data is too long


run_cost_dist(burn, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface.tif")))

```

```{r}
# SMALL

# Creating small box
bbox <- ext(150.230, 150.280, -33.190, -33.140)
bbox_vect <- as.polygons(bbox)
crs(bbox_vect) <- "EPSG:4283"  
bbox_proj <- project(bbox_vect, crs(cost))
cost_crop_sm <- crop(cost, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Cost
wol_tr_crop_sm <- st_crop(wol_tr_gda94, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Tracks
plot(cost_crop_sm)

cost_sm <- load_cost_raster(cost_crop_sm)
track_sm <- load_tracks(wol_tr_crop_sm)
burn_sm <- burn_tracks(cost_sm, track_sm)
cost_surface_sm<- run_cost_dist(burn_sm, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_sm.tif")), overwrite=TRUE)
cost_surface_sm <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_sm.tif"))
plot_cost_with_tracks(cost_surface_sm, tracks = track_sm, filename = "output/plots/cost_rast_sm.png")

# Raster CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Tracks CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Raster dimensions: 2834 rows x 2405 cols (6,815,770 cells)
# Resolution: 2 x 2 m
# Rasterizing tracks onto cost surface...
# Track cells rasterized: 14,905 (0.22% of raster)
# Running costDist (maxiter=50)...
# costDist completed in 11.26 seconds
# Estimated peak memory: 143.9 MB
```


```{r}
# MEDIUM

# Creating medium box
bbox <- ext(150.205, 150.305, -33.215, -33.115)
bbox_vect <- as.polygons(bbox)
crs(bbox_vect) <- "EPSG:4283"  
bbox_proj <- project(bbox_vect, crs(cost))
cost_crop_mm <- crop(cost, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Cost
wol_tr_crop_mm <- st_crop(wol_tr_gda94, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Tracks
plot(cost_crop_mm)

cost_mm <- load_cost_raster(cost_crop_mm)
track_mm <- load_tracks(wol_tr_crop_mm)
burn_mm <- burn_tracks(cost_mm, track_mm)
cost_surface_mm<- run_cost_dist(burn_mm, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_mm.tif")), overwrite=TRUE)
cost_surface_mm <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_mm.tif"))
plot_cost_with_tracks(cost_surface_mm, tracks = track_mm, filename = "output/plots/cost_rast_mm.png")


# Raster CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Tracks CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Raster dimensions: 5668 rows x 4810 cols (27,263,080 cells)
# Resolution: 2 x 2 m
# Rasterizing tracks onto cost surface...
# Track cells rasterized: 25,634 (0.09% of raster)
# Running costDist (maxiter=50)...
# costDist completed in 40.89 seconds
# Estimated peak memory: 143.8 MB
```

```{r}
# LARGE

# Creating large box
bbox <- ext(150.155, 150.355, -33.265, -33.065)
bbox_vect <- as.polygons(bbox)
crs(bbox_vect) <- "EPSG:4283"  
bbox_proj <- project(bbox_vect, crs(cost))
cost_crop_lg <- crop(cost, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Cost
wol_tr_crop_lg <- st_crop(wol_tr_gda94, bbox_proj, mask = TRUE) # Tracks
plot(cost_crop_lg)

cost_lg <- load_cost_raster(cost_crop_lg)
track_lg <- load_tracks(wol_tr_crop_lg)
burn_lg <- burn_tracks(cost_lg, track_lg)
cost_surface_lg<- run_cost_dist(burn_lg, filename= (paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_lg.tif")), overwrite=TRUE)
cost_surface_lg <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir,"output/cost_surface_lg.tif"))
plot_cost_with_tracks(cost_surface_lg, tracks = track_mm, filename = "output/plots/cost_rast_lg.png")

# Raster CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Tracks CRS: GDA94 / MGA zone 56 (EPSG:28356)
# Raster dimensions: 11336 rows x 9620 cols (109,052,320 cells)
# Resolution: 2 x 2 m
# Rasterizing tracks onto cost surface...
# Track cells rasterized: 63,079 (0.06% of raster)
# Running costDist (maxiter=50)...
# costDist completed in 208.72 seconds
# Estimated peak memory: 192.1 MB
```
